name: SOL Risk Policy Diagnostic
scope: Research Lab offline risk-policy diagnostic only. Test SOL risk caps after frozen trial-00095 entry population is fixed. No entry tuning, threshold changes, exit changes, shadow design, PAPER deployment, runtime, core, settings, execution, or production storage changes.
edge_rationale: SOL forensic analysis showed strong edge but higher drawdown and longer loss streaks than BTC/ETH. A smaller SOL risk cap may preserve SOL contribution while keeping portfolio capital drawdown inside policy.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No new trading mechanism is tested. The existing sweep/reclaim transfer mechanism remains frozen; only portfolio risk sizing is evaluated offline.
required_data: Audited BTC, ETH, and SOL research datasets
baseline_reference: BTC+ETH baseline: 696 approved trades, ER 1.955, PF 3.60, capital DD estimate 4.809%
frozen_assumptions: SOL entry population remains frozen from trial-00095 transfer replay.
Risk-cap changes only offline SOL signal risk_pct.
No runtime, shadow, PAPER, LIVE, core, orchestrator, settings, execution, or production storage changes.
expected_observation: If SOL is portfolio-safe with smaller size, one or more SOL risk caps should pass capital DD, ER, PF, SOL contribution, incremental PnL, and DD-increase gates.

kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings/execution/storage production change invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.entry_tuning: Any SOL-specific entry, threshold, or exit tuning invalidates the diagnostic.
kill_criteria.source_db_mutation: Mutating audited BTC/ETH/SOL source datasets invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.promotion_claim: Any SOL shadow/PAPER/runtime approval claim invalidates the milestone.

failure_modes: All SOL risk caps fail capital drawdown gates.
Smaller SOL risk caps reduce DD but add too little incremental PnL.
SOL contribution is too low after portfolio vetoes.
R-space metrics look good but capital DD remains above policy.
out_of_scope: Changing core, orchestrator, settings, execution, risk, or production storage
author: Codex
